steps.title: Track the lead pattern
steps.content: The passage says Shang dynasty bronze artifacts contain a rare form of lead, while bronze artifacts from after the Shang dynasty do not. That absence suggests the source of that lead-bearing raw material stopped being used after the Shang period.

steps.title: Reject unsupported inferences
steps.content: Choice A adds value and rarity claims about Shang bronze pieces. Choice C contradicts the passage because bronze artifacts continued after the Shang dynasty. Choice D introduces analysis methods, which the passage never discusses. The logical inference is that a raw-material source was used only through the Shang dynasty. The answer is B.
